# ASImportableLinkedItem

**Structure**

A linked item for use in import and export.

## Declaration

```swift
struct ASImportableLinkedItem
```

## Overview

A linked item serves as a reference to an item, and contains no data of its own.

This type is a representation of `LinkedItem` as defined in the Credential Exchange Format (CXF) specification. You can supply a JSON representation of a CXF `Item` to initialize an instance of this struct by using a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/JSONDecoder] and calling [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/JSONDecoder/decode(_:from:)].

## Creating a linked item

- **init(item:account:)**: Creates a linked item from the identifiers of an item and an account.

## Accessing linked item properties

- **item**: The unique identifier of the item linked by this linked item.
- **account**: The unique identifier of the account, if any, to which the linked item belongs.

## Accessing collection properties

- **id**: A unique identifier for the collection.
- **title**: The title of the collection.
- **subtitle**: The subtitle of the collection, if any.
- **items**: The items that are part of the collection.
- **subcollections**: Subcollections that are part of the collection.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
